text: Wandering through this space, I am curious and alert. The modernity of the architecture and the glass surfaces create a sense of transparency and openness, yet there is also a strange detachment—everything seems to be waiting for purpose or activity. Inside, the vibrant wall about research and development inspires me to reflect on human curiosity and progress. The words and images evoke a feeling of hope—yet tempered by uncertainty. I feel poised between anticipation and contemplation, energized by potential but mindful of the unknowns that await.
